title: Robbia macrocarpa

The species is native to South Africa and is known for its unique characteristics. Robbia macrocarpa is further classified as a member of the order Ranunculales and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Robbia macrocarpa is still a subject of ongoing research and study in the botanical community.
